mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DDD_MATCH_RESULT ( RESULT_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, DOG_ACTIVITY, DOG_SOCIALITY, DOG_INDEPENDENCE, DOG_BARKING, DOG_GROOMING, RESULT_CREATED_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_MATCH_RESULT.NEXTVAL, #{userNumber}, #{dogActivity}, #{dogSociality}, #{dogIndependence}, #{dogBarking}, #{dogGrooming}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT RESULT_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, DOG_ACTIVITY, DOG_SOCIALITY, DOG_INDEPENDENCE, DOG_BARKING, DOG_GROOMING, TO_CHAR(RESULT_CREATED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RESULT_CREATED_DATE FROM ( SELECT * FROM DDD_MATCH_RESULT WHERE USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} ORDER BY RESULT_CREATED_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT RESULT_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, DOG_ACTIVITY, DOG_SOCIALITY, DOG_INDEPENDENCE, DOG_BARKING, DOG_GROOMING, TO_CHAR(RESULT_CREATED_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS RESULT_CREATED_DATE FROM DDD_MATCH_RESULT WHERE USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} ORDER BY RESULT_NUMBER DESC
